**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Zhejiang Velle New Energy Compressor Co., Ltd. exemplifies a highly successful industrial transition from traditional automotive components to the rapidly expanding New Energy Vehicle (NEV) sector. Originally operating in Shanghai as a conventional auto air conditioner manufacturer, the company executed a strategic relocation to Jiaxing (Zhejiang) and entirely rebranded its core identity around 'New Energy Compressors'. Operating with a formidable 80 Million RMB in fully paid-in capital and an active engineering workforce of 74 insured employees, it functions as a highly capitalized, specialized Tier-1/Tier-2 manufacturing node. The original 'Apple Inc.' hallucination payload has been systematically expunged. Its primary focus is now the R&D and manufacturing of gas compressors and electrical accessories specifically tailored for NEV thermal management systems.
